subtasks.description: Query SQL warehouse to compute current month spend, 3-month rolling average, and variance metrics by vendor/category. Calculate variance percentage and deviation from baseline.
Reconcile spend variance results and classify anomalies into three tiers (normal_variance, concerning, critical) based on deviation thresholds. Generate anomaly summary with root-cause indicators.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks are the minimum: (1) sql_gen computes the spend metrics and variance in a single multi-CTE query (current month + 3-month avg + variance calc); assigned mid tier because it requires multi-month aggregation logic and window functions. (2) cross_recon performs the classification logic—mapping variance to severity classes—and is assigned mid tier because it interprets multi-signal variance data and applies classification rules. No policy_action is needed because classification is a data-driven decision, not a governance approval. No separate extraction or multitool_plan is needed.

output.sql: SELECT vendor_name, current_month, current_spend, avg_3mo, ROUND(avg_3mo * 0.10, 2) AS threshold_10pct, ROUND(avg_3mo * 0.25, 2) AS threshold_25pct, ROUND(current_spend - avg_3mo, 2) AS variance_usd, CASE WHEN avg_3mo = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(((current_spend - avg_3mo) / avg_3mo) * 100, 2) END AS variance_pct, CASE WHEN avg_3mo = 0 THEN 'no_baseline' WHEN ABS(current_spend - avg_3mo) <= avg_3mo * 0.10 THEN 'normal_variance' WHEN ABS(current_spend - avg_3mo) <= avg_3mo * 0.25 THEN 'concerning' ELSE 'critical' END AS anomaly_classification FROM ( SELECT vendor_name, DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date) AS current_month, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS current_spend, AVG(monthly_spend) OVER (PARTITION BY vendor_name ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date) ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS avg_3mo FROM ( SELECT vendor_name, DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date) AS invoice_month, SUM(amount_usd) AS monthly_spend, invoice_date FROM invoice_facts GROUP BY vendor_name, DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date), invoice_date ) monthly_agg GROUP BY vendor_name, DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date) ) spend_summary WHERE current_month = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY ABS(variance_usd) DESC NULLS LAST
